payload.title: Define the append-only event format & on-disk layout
payload.description:
Design the canonical append-only event format that becomes Scope's source of truth.

## Event shape
Each event is one immutable record: `{ v, id (ULID), ts, actor, kind, payload }`.

`kind` covers every mutation Scope can make: workspace.init/set, ticket.create, ticket.set_field, ticket.delete, comment.add, relation.add, relation.remove.

## On-disk layout
One file per event under `.scope/events/`, named by ULID. One-file-per-event means two peers adding events never touch the same file — git sees only new files, so there is nothing to conflict on. (A single append-only NDJSON log was rejected because concurrent appends collide.)

## Acceptance
- A written spec (doc + schema module) for every event kind and its payload.
- ULID gives global ordering + uniqueness without coordination.
- scope.db/-wal/-shm stay gitignored; .scope/events/ is the tracked/synced unit.
